summary: Phase 1 (Talent Identity Auto-fill) verified end-to-end. Backend prefill endpoint passes 6/6 pytest cases (safe-field allowlist, empty for unknown/malformed/missing email, 429 after 20/min/IP). Frontend on both desktop (1280x800) and mobile (390x844) shows Email as the FIRST input under Talent Details, the prefill suggestion card surfaces with 'We found your profile.' headline + Use this/Edit manually CTAs, applyPrefill respects pre-typed fields (First Name 'Manual' was preserved while empty Last Name='B', Location='Mumbai', Height select='5\'8"' got filled), 'Welcome back, A' toast appears, Edit manually dismisses without modifying state, unknown email is silent no-op, and no media (file inputs) gets pre-populated.
critical_code_review_comments: Rate limiter is in-process Dict (not Redis) — fine for single-replica preview, but won't share state across multiple backend pods. Already documented in code comments.

Prefill projection in /app/backend/routers/submissions.py also fetches `phone` from DB but the spec line 'verify NO media/bio/gender/work_links keys' did not exclude phone. Phone IS surfaced (intentional per docstring on line 78 'Phone is included so the talent doesn't have to retype it'). Confirmed safe per allowlist; no PII leak beyond what the talent already typed.
applyPrefill compares with truthy `f.first_name || data.first_name` — if a user types whitespace it would be considered 'typed' and not overwritten. Acceptable but worth a `.trim()` guard.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all critical flows: email-first placement desktop+mobile, suggestion card visibility, Use this preserves typed fields, Edit manually dismiss, unknown email silent, no media populated, Welcome toast)

test_credentials: No client/admin auth required. Public seed talent: test_afd08d@ex.com (first='A', last='B', height=5'8", location=Mumbai). Public project slug: autoflow-c66e26.
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded talent test_afd08d@ex.com.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 prefill is GREEN. Test IDs use HYPHENS not underscores: form-email, form-first-name, form-last-name, form-location, form-height-trigger (custom Select; the value lives in trigger button text-content, not an input value), prefill-suggestion-card, prefill-use-btn, prefill-dismiss-btn. Toast surface text 'Welcome back, <first_name>' appears in document body. Backend rate limiter uses X-Forwarded-For first IP — pass distinct headers to avoid cross-test interference. The known seed talent test_afd08d@ex.com may need re-seeding if dropped; if /api/public/prefill returns {} for it, a fresh /api/admin/talents create + approve will restore it.
